articles.title_en: Ricci: the volume of investments in Russian real estate could reach about 1 trillion rubles
articles.lead_en: This is approximately 10% lower than the 2025 figure, according to the company’s analytical materials.

articles.title_en: The prime ministers of the Russian Federation and Belarus discuss economic integration in Yekaterinburg
articles.lead_en: The city will host the XVI international industrial exhibition "Innoprom" from July 6 to 9.

articles.title_en: Shokhin: the ruble exchange rate may enter the range of 80-85 rubles per dollar by the end of the year
articles.lead_en: The head of the Russian Union of Industrialists and Entrepreneurs believes that such parameters make it possible to balance the interests of all stakeholders
articles.title_raw: Шохин: курс рубля до конца года может войти в диапазон 80-85 рублей за доллар
articles.lead_raw: Глава Российского союза промышленников и предпринимателей считает, что такие параметры позволяют балансировать интересы всех заинтересованных сторон

articles.title_en: Kiriyenko: investments in the Kaliningrad region will reach almost 1 trillion rubles
articles.lead_en: One of the key projects will be the creation of the national center "Russia"
